exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your spiritual growth forward
items: Research and identify 3 spiritual books, podcasts, or teachers that align with your current questions and interests
Establish a consistent daily spiritual practice by choosing and scheduling one 10-15 minute activity (meditation, prayer, journaling, or nature connection)
Create a personal spiritual foundation document outlining your core beliefs, values, and current spiritual questions or areas of exploration
Set up a dedicated meditation or prayer space in your home with a cushion, chair, or mat and any meaningful objects that support your practice
Attend or research 3 different spiritual communities, meditation groups, or faith gatherings to explore where you might find supportive connection
Schedule and complete a spiritual self-assessment by journaling about your current life challenges, spiritual strengths, and areas where you seek growth or healing
